name: MSI PRO B660M-A WIFI Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-6200+(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 - 2x HDMI 2.1 - 2x DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6 - BT 5.2 (PROB660MAWI)
shortName: MSI PRO B660M-A WIFI Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Micro ATX Intel B660 motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR5-6200 support and WiFi 6.
